Module lifeline
Package simulation

Class SimulationEngine

java.lang.Object
simulation.SimulationEngine
public class SimulationEngine extends Object
Manages the execution of the simulation. The simulation engine maintains the graph, the agents, and the current simulation tick.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SimulationEngine(Graph graph, IPathFinder pathFinder)
    Creates a new simulation engine.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addAgent(Agent agent)
    Adds an agent to the simulation.
    void
    clearAgents()
    Removes all agents from the simulation and resets the simulation tick.

    getAgents()
    Returns all agents currently managed by the simulation.
    long
    getCurrentTick()
    Returns the current simulation tick.
    Graph
    getGraph()
    Returns the graph associated with the simulation.
    void
    moveAgent(Agent agent)
    Moves the agent along the shortest path toward its destination.

    Removes an agent from the simulation entirely.
    void
    reset()
    Resets the simulation to its initial state.
    void
    setArrivalBehavior(ArrivalBehavior behavior)
    Defines what should happen when an agent reaches its destination.
    void
    setDefaultPathFinder(IPathFinder pathFinder)
    Sets the default routing algorithm used by agents without a custom pathfinder.
    void
    tick()
    Advances the simulation by one tick.

  • Constructor Details

    • SimulationEngine

      public SimulationEngine(Graph graph, IPathFinder pathFinder)
      Creates a new simulation engine.
      Parameters:
      graph - graph used during the simulation

  • Method Details

    • getCurrentTick

      public long getCurrentTick()
      Returns the current simulation tick.
      Returns:
      current tick value

    • getGraph

      public Graph getGraph()
      Returns the graph associated with the simulation.
      Returns:
      simulation graph

    • getAgents

      public List<Agent> getAgents()
      Returns all agents currently managed by the simulation.
      Returns:
      list of agents

    • setArrivalBehavior

      public void setArrivalBehavior(ArrivalBehavior behavior)
      Defines what should happen when an agent reaches its destination.
      Parameters:
      behavior - arrival behavior to apply

    • setDefaultPathFinder

      public void setDefaultPathFinder(IPathFinder pathFinder)
      Sets the default routing algorithm used by agents without a custom pathfinder.
      Parameters:
      pathFinder - default pathfinding strategy

    • addAgent

      public void addAgent(Agent agent)
      Adds an agent to the simulation.
      Parameters:
      agent - agent to add

    • removeAgent

      public void removeAgent(Agent agent)
      Removes an agent from the simulation entirely. This method removes the agent from the simulation's managed list and clears its physical presence from the graph's nodes and edges.
      Parameters:
      agent - agent to remove

    • moveAgent

      public void moveAgent(Agent agent)
      Moves the agent along the shortest path toward its destination. Handles speed surplus (multiple edges per tick) and edge capacity. If the next edge is at full capacity, the agent waits until a spot is available.
      Parameters:
      agent - the agent to move

    • tick

      public void tick()
      Advances the simulation by one tick.

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets the simulation to its initial state.

    • clearAgents

      public void clearAgents()
      Removes all agents from the simulation and resets the simulation tick.
